evals.prompt: 현재 변경사항을 커밋해줘
evals.expected_output: Conventional Commits 규칙에 따른 커밋 메시지 생성 및 커밋 실행

evals.prompt: commit this with a proper message
evals.expected_output: Analyzes changes and commits with proper conventional commit type

evals.prompt: PR 올려줘
evals.expected_output: Branch 분석 후 PR title/body 생성 및 gh pr create 실행

evals.prompt: open a pull request for the current changes
evals.expected_output: Generates PR with summary, changes, test plan sections

evals.prompt: try-claude 설정은 어떻게 하나요? init-try랑 migration 차이가 뭐예요?
evals.expected_output: FAQ 형식으로 init-try와 migration 차이를 한국어로 설명

evals.prompt: MCP 설정을 팀원들과 공유하려면 어떻게 해야 하나요?
evals.expected_output: shared vs machine-local config 분리 설명, OS별 템플릿 위치 안내

evals.prompt: 이 프로젝트에 try-claude를 초기화해줘
evals.expected_output: .claude/try-claude/ 디렉토리 구조 생성 및 reference 시딩

evals.prompt: bootstrap the try-claude runtime for this repo
evals.expected_output: Creates project.json, references/, plans/, reports/, logs/, codemaps/, humanmaps/

evals.prompt: try-claude 레퍼런스를 최신 플러그인 기본값과 동기화해줘
evals.expected_output: Unchanged sections updated, edited sections preserved

evals.prompt: sync my local references with the latest plugin defaults
evals.expected_output: Runs migration script, reports updated/skipped/reseeded counts

evals.prompt: 프로젝트 문서를 업데이트해줘. CODEMAPS랑 HUMANMAPS 둘 다 갱신해줘.
evals.expected_output: CODEMAPS .md 파일과 HUMANMAPS .html 파일 생성/업데이트

evals.prompt: generate project documentation for the current codebase
evals.expected_output: Runs detect_changes.mjs, extract_structure.mjs, generates INDEX.md and related docs

evals.prompt: 이 프로젝트에 ESLint, commitlint, husky 설정을 coding-rules 기반으로 생성해줘
evals.expected_output: Framework detection, coding-rules 읽기, ESLint/commitlint/husky config 생성 계획 제시

evals.prompt: set up linting and commit hooks based on our coding conventions
evals.expected_output: Detects framework, audits existing configs, presents per-group approval plan

evals.prompt: 로그인 페이지에 useAuth 커스텀 훅을 만들고 API 연동해줘
evals.expected_output: Custom hook 생성, API integration, TDD workflow 실행

evals.prompt: create a custom hook for fetching user profile data with TanStack Query
evals.expected_output: useUserProfile hook with TanStack Query, proper error handling

evals.prompt: 사용자 인증 API 엔드포인트를 NestJS로 구현해줘
evals.expected_output: NestJS controller/service/module 생성, JWT auth 구현

evals.prompt: implement a REST API endpoint for CRUD operations on products
evals.expected_output: Auto-detect framework, create controller/service with CRUD endpoints

evals.prompt: 대시보드 레이아웃 컴포넌트를 만들어줘. 사이드바, 헤더, 메인 콘텐츠 영역 포함
evals.expected_output: React component with Tailwind CSS, responsive layout, no business logic

evals.prompt: create a responsive card grid component with shadcn/ui styling
evals.expected_output: Layout-first React component with shadcn/ui, mobile-first responsive design

evals.prompt: plan.md에 정의된 3개 Phase를 worktree 격리 방식으로 실행해줘
evals.expected_output: Worktree creation, sequential phase execution, merge, cleanup

evals.prompt: execute the plan at .claude/try-claude/plans/auth-feature/plan.md with worktree isolation
evals.expected_output: Validates plan headers, creates worktree, dispatches phase agents, merges

evals.prompt: 변경된 웹 코드의 접근성을 KWCAG2.2 기준으로 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: 33 KWCAG items evaluated, HTML+CSV report generated

evals.prompt: run an accessibility audit on the changed files
evals.expected_output: Static analysis + Playwright checks, O/X/triangle results for all 33 items

evals.prompt: 변경된 코드의 보안, 호환성, 코드 품질을 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: BP-01 through BP-14 evaluated, markdown checklist output

evals.prompt: check the changed files for web best practices compliance
evals.expected_output: Security, compatibility, code quality items evaluated

evals.prompt: 변경된 페이지의 SEO 최적화 상태를 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: SEO-01 through SEO-10 evaluated, markdown checklist output

evals.prompt: review the SEO status of the changed HTML files
evals.expected_output: Critical/High/Medium SEO items evaluated

evals.prompt: 변경된 코드의 웹 성능 이슈를 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: PERF-01 through PERF-11 evaluated, markdown checklist output

evals.prompt: check the changed files for performance anti-patterns
evals.expected_output: CRP, image, JS, font performance items evaluated

evals.prompt: 변경된 코드의 Core Web Vitals 영향을 분석해줘
evals.expected_output: CWV-01 through CWV-11 evaluated, markdown checklist output

evals.prompt: analyze the impact on LCP, INP, and CLS for the changed files
evals.expected_output: LCP/INP/CLS items evaluated with specific recommendations

evals.prompt: 변경된 코드에 대해 종합 웹 품질 검토를 실행해줘
evals.expected_output: 5-area unified HTML+CSV report (a11y, BP, SEO, perf, CWV)

evals.prompt: run a full web quality audit on the current changes
evals.expected_output: Orchestrates all 5 sub-skills, generates unified report
